# refreshInterval

**Instance Property**

The amount of time, in seconds, between updates to the pending set.

## Declaration

```swift
var refreshInterval: TimeInterval { get }
```

## Accessing Refresh Data

- **domainVersion**: The domain version when the system last refreshed the pending set.
